name: Yellow Finance protected pages refactor plan and canonical page rules
description: Plan the frontend-only refactor of the protected `apps/web` experience around the approved Yellow Finance mobile-first shell and screens, and update the canonical frontend docs so future page work follows the new shared page-wrapper rules instead of `PageShell`.

planned: Used using-skills first, classified the work as Level 2, and used writing-plans because the user explicitly asked for an implementation plan before the multi-batch frontend refactor.

Read docs/PLANS.md, docs/exec-plans/__plan-template__.md, docs/exec-plans/index.md, docs/design-docs/mobile-first-protected-shell-and-tab-surfaces.md, docs/FRONTEND.md, and the key frontend reference docs before drafting the ExecPlan.

Mapped the current protected route pages, shell/layout files, auth redirect touchpoints, route constants, and current PageShell dependency points so the plan names exact files instead of generic frontend areas.
Updated canonical frontend docs so future page work now points to the new protected page-surface wrapper pattern and the four-tab responsive shell model instead of creating new PageShell-based pages.
verification: Validated harness/feature_index.json and harness/features/feat-073.json with python3 -m json.tool.
Checked the new ExecPlan and updated frontend docs for the expected Yellow Finance protected-shell and page-wrapper terms.
Final ./init.sh returned Done! after the planning/docs updates.
Final gitnexus_detect_changes(scope: all) recorded the docs-only blast radius for the planning session.

notes: Planning/docs session only. The implementation itself has not started yet. The active ExecPlan should be executed in a later session.
